message:
fix: cluster info cards no longer overflow on hover (#8841) (#8949)

Replace hover:scale transforms with hover:shadow-lg + hover:-translate-y-0.5
on all three cluster card variants (full/list/compact) so the card footprint
stays constant on hover. The prior fix (#8569) wrapped the grid in
overflow-hidden with -mx-2 compensating padding, but -mx-2 extended the grid
beyond its parent by 8px on each side, which is exactly the overflow users
were still seeing on edge cards. Since the new hover effect preserves the
bounding box, the negative margins are removed and a small pt-1 replaces
-my-1 to give the upward translate room within the container.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
